# Olympia Brand — Copilot Instructions

## Project
Brand assets for the Olympia upgrade (Ethereum Classic governance/funding).

## Tech
- SVG logos, ImageMagick for PNG generation
- CSS custom properties for design tokens
- Tailwind CSS 4 @theme integration

## Rules
- Brand green: `#00ffae`
- Font: Inter + JetBrains Mono
- Dark-first: `#0a0f10` background
- SVGs are source of truth
- Do not modify torch logo geometry
